title: scutellaria granulosa
intro: Scutellaria granulosa, also known as the hairy skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of scutellaria granulosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Scutellaria granulosa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
